_comment: Canonical list of Claude Code plugins + standalone skills that sync-extensions keeps installed and up to date. Each asset has a 'priority': 'base' = always installed (mandatory); 'optional'/'extra' = installed only when selected. For optional/extra, 'default' sets whether it is on before the user picks (optional defaults true, extra defaults false). User selections persist in $CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR/.sync-extensions-selection.json (managed via sync.sh --enable/--disable). Edit this file to add/remove items or change priorities, then run the skill.

standalone_skills.note: Installed via the vercel-labs 'skills' CLI (npx skills@latest). Tracked in ~/.agents/.skill-lock.json. Each repo carries its own priority.
